## Summary

Describe the change and the reason for it.

## Linked Issues

- Closes:
- Related:

## Validation

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `cd web && npm test -- --run`
- [ ] `cd web && npm run build`
- [ ] CI / security workflows passed in GitHub
- [ ] Deployment path validated if infra/runtime changed

## Compliance

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Security-impacting changes reviewed
- [ ] Audit/evidence implications considered
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed
- [ ] BSI C5 baseline impact understood if security or deployment changed

## Release Risk

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High

## Notes

List follow-up items, rollout caveats, or operator actions. Include any branch-protection, rollout, or approval dependencies.
